_comment: Pseudo-mod aggregation: pseudo_id -> the real stat ids that sum into it. SEED ONLY. The pseudo *ids* come from /api/trade2/data/stats; the *composition* (which real stats feed each pseudo) is harvested/curated from Exiled-Exchange-2 in the Phase-0 task (PRICING_MODULE_PLAN.md §11). The stat_* ids below are PLACEHOLDERS marked _example and must be replaced with the real /data/stats ids before live use. Empty-slot pseudos take a min count, not a sum.

aggregates.note: fire/cold/lightning are fungible (ele_res family); chaos res is NOT included

empty_slots.note: Confirm exact ids from /data/stats. Used by the rare_potential strategy to price crafting headroom (require >= N empty prefix/suffix), never to fabricate the missing mods.
